subject: Got it, {{first_name}}. I will be in touch within two days.
body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Thank you for reaching out. I have received your enquiry for {{person_name}}'s {{occasion_type}} on {{occasion_date}} and I will be in touch personally within two days.

In the meantime, if you have any inspiration photos or extra details you would like to share, feel free to reply directly to this email.

{{#if occasion_book_opted_in}}

One more thing. I have added {{person_name}}'s {{occasion_type}} to my Occasion Book. This means next year I will reach out before the date so you never have to worry about remembering to order. You are already taken care of.

{{/if}}{{#if whatsapp_opted_in}}

You have also signed up for WhatsApp reminders. I will send you a message before the occasion each year so it is never a surprise.

{{/if}}

Speak soon,
Hazel

Hazel's Cake Lounge
{{business_phone}}
{{business_email}}

To unsubscribe from emails, reply with UNSUBSCRIBE.

subject: New enquiry: {{person_name}}'s {{occasion_type}} on {{occasion_date}}
body:
Hi Hazel,

A new enquiry has just come in. Here are the details:

Customer{{customer_name}}
Email{{customer_email}}
Phone{{customer_phone}}
Occasion for{{person_name}}
Occasion type{{occasion_type}}
Date needed{{occasion_date}}
Their idea{{customer_notes}}
Occasion Book{{occasion_book_status}}
WhatsApp reminders{{whatsapp_status}}

Log in to your Command Centre to view the full enquiry and update the order status.

{{admin_dashboard_url}}

You have 24 hours before a follow up reminder is sent to you.

subject: Reminder: {{customer_name}} is still waiting for a reply.
body:
Hi Hazel,

Just a gentle nudge. {{customer_name}} sent an enquiry 24 hours ago and has not received a personal reply yet.

Their occasion is {{person_name}}'s {{occasion_type}} on {{occasion_date}}.

Log in to your Command Centre to respond:
{{admin_dashboard_url}}

subject: You are in the Occasion Book, {{first_name}}.
body:
Hi {{first_name}},

You are officially in my Occasion Book. I have added {{person_name}}'s {{occasion_type}} to my personal record, the same little book I keep for every person I bake for.

Here is what that means for you. You will hear from me before every occasion, with plenty of time to plan, so you never have to worry about missing a moment. Your first reminder will arrive about one month before the date.

You do not have to remember. I will remember for you.

Warmly,
Hazel

Hazel's Cake Lounge
{{business_phone}}
{{business_email}}

subject: {{person_name}}'s {{occasion_type}} is a month away.
body:
Hi {{first_name}},

It is Hazel. I wanted to reach out personally because {{person_name}}'s {{occasion_type}} is just about a month away.

I would love to bake something special for the day. My diary fills up quickly, so it is worth getting your order in early while there is plenty of choice.

Whenever you are ready, you can tell me what you have in mind here:
{{enquiry_url}}

Warmly,
Hazel

subject: Two weeks until {{person_name}}'s {{occasion_type}}.
body:
Hi {{first_name}},

A gentle reminder from Hazel that {{person_name}}'s {{occasion_type}} is two weeks away.

Would you like to bring back a favourite, or try something new this year? Either way, I would love to make it for you.

Tell me your idea here:
{{enquiry_url}}

Warmly,
Hazel

subject: One week to go, {{first_name}}. Let's make it special.
body:
Hi {{first_name}},

One week until {{person_name}}'s {{occasion_type}}. My diary is filling up for that week, so if you would like me to bake for you, now is the moment.

It will only take a minute to tell me what you would love:
{{enquiry_url}}

Warmly,
Hazel

subject: How did {{person_name}}'s {{occasion_type}} go?
body:
Hi {{first_name}},

It is Hazel. I have been thinking about you and hoping {{person_name}}'s {{occasion_type}} was everything you wanted it to be.

I would love to hear how it went, and if you took a photo I would treasure seeing it.

Next year I will be in touch again before the occasion, so you never have to think about it.

Warmly,
Hazel

subject: Happy Birthday, {{first_name}}.
body:
Hi {{first_name}},

It is Hazel. No reminders and no cake talk today. I just wanted to wish you a very happy birthday.

I hope your day is warm, slow, and full of the people you love.

With love,
Hazel

subject: Your Cake Memory Card is inside, {{first_name}}.
body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Your Cake Memory Card is attached to this email. It is a little keepsake of {{person_name}}'s {{occasion_type}}, something to hold onto long after the last slice.

Save it somewhere safe. I loved being part of your celebration.

Warmly,
Hazel

Hazel's Cake Lounge
{{business_phone}}
{{business_email}}

subject: Here is what we are celebrating together this year, {{first_name}}.
body:
Hi {{first_name}},

Happy New Year. As the year begins, here is everything I have in my Occasion Book for you:

{{occasion_list}}

I will be in touch before each one, with plenty of time to plan, so you never have to remember. That is my job now.

Here is to a year of moments worth celebrating.

Warmly,
Hazel
